question: Why is it important to check the electrical wiring of a self-built UA?

options.text: Ensure that appropriate Center of Gravity is applied.
Ensure no loose wires can come into contact with the spinning propellers.
Prevent radio systems from being interfered or to interfere other radio equipment.
Ensure all screws securely fastened and applied with cable tie if necessary.

classification_notes: General UAS knowledge and UA-category topics are being tested.
